announcements.author: mira
announcements.text: Lab meeting this Friday 2pm in Bio 4203. Bring strain design notes and any qPCR data from this week.

announcements.author: mira
announcements.text: DOE renewal abstract is due May 29. Please flag any preliminary-data figures you want me to include — I'm anchoring on the FakeYeast biofuel results plus morgan's 96-well screen.

announcements.author: mira
announcements.text: Reminder: freezer 5 cleanout this Saturday. Label any tubes you want kept by Friday EOD. Unlabeled tubes go into the discard bin per lab SOP.
